name: Telegram: Start

description.en: Greet the user when they start a conversation with the Telegram bot.
description.de: Begrüße den Nutzer, wenn er eine Konversation mit dem Telegram-Bot startet.

bot: Triggered when a user sends the /start command to the Telegram bot. Greet the user and briefly introduce yourself and what you can help with.

actions.prompt: The user just started a conversation with you via Telegram by sending the /start command. Greet them warmly and briefly introduce yourself and what you can help with.
